caption: The video displays a split-screen broadcast featuring Narendra Modi on the left and a group of seated men on the right. Modi is wearing a white kurta, a blue vest, and a saffron, white, and green stole, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. To the right, several men are seated in chairs; some wear saffron scarves or red caps. The background behind Modi is a repetitive pattern of the lotus symbol. At the top of the screen, the Hindi text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" is displayed alongside the lotus logo. Other on-screen elements include "प्रजनमेत्री" and "दिल्ली" in small bubbles, and "लाइव रैलें" near social media icons for Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram with the handle "/BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across the frames, the visual composition remains constant, with only slight changes in the people's posture and Modi's hand gestures.
